name: Long Table Growth Corp.
business: The company is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses. It has not identified any specific business combination target and intends to focus on financial technology, property technology, industrial technology/infrastructure, and energy transition.

exposures.sentence: Our management team's long track record includes varied investments across financial technology, property technology, industrial technology/infrastructure and energy transition.
